title: koeleria insubrica
intro: Koeleria insubrica, also known as Alpine Hair-grass, is a perennial grass native to the high-altitude regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria insubrica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Koeleria insubrica can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments such as arthritis and gastrointestinal issues.
